Then what is the sense of this
resolution last night? 1t simply is
surplussage All that is necessary
is for the city to stand pat. They
don't need to force anybody to do
anything.


If the city solons would, for five
minutes, exercise in the public in
terest a part of the business sense
the Washington Water Power com
pany exercises in it's private inter
ests, these matters would solve
themselves and this overtaxed
city's burdens would be reduced. :.


The city don't need a new bridge
on Howard street. If the Washing
ton Water Power company needs it.,
let it build it. Don't, Mr.. Council
man, vote the peoples hard-earned
cash into the private pocket of this
already money-bIoated corporation.
